title: plantmanager.equipment.deleted data
description: PLACEHOLDER — this schema is provisional and will change before v1 is finalised. Data payload for the plantmanager.equipment.deleted event, emitted when an equipment record is deleted from PlantManager.

id.description: Identifier of the equipment record that was deleted.

tenantKey.description: Tenant identifier of the organization that owned the record.

tagNumber.description: Equipment tag number as displayed in PlantManager at time of deletion.

deletedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the equipment record was deleted.

deletedBy.description: Identity of the user or service that deleted the record.
